intent: When a working agent approaches its context ceiling, it finishes the current atomic step, writes a complete handoff packet, and yields to a fresh successor that continues from the packet alone — before quality degrades, not after.

state.handoff_packet: object matching the profile's handoff_contract: action_taken, status, artifacts, decisions_made, open_items, next_steps
state.successor_ack: boolean — successor confirms the packet suffices to continue
state.generation: integer — how many successions this task has seen

nodes.role_ref: fresh instance of the same profile

edges.when: context ceiling signal received (see hook.context-zone-guard) and current atomic step is complete
packet satisfies the handoff_contract (all required fields present and concrete)
packet incomplete — fill the named gaps before yielding
successor_ack == true; successor becomes the new incumbent and the task continues

termination: succession completes on successor_ack; if generation exceeds budget.max_iterations the task escalates to a human instead of chaining successors indefinitely
